redaction_note: Synthetic compact fixture for route-sensitive tournament calibration.
summary: Fourth compact fixture gives the batch enough samples for optional review value.
setpoint: preserve route-specific winners without importing historical run inventory

turns.speaker: fixture-policy
turns.text: Do not publish public Farcaster casts or replies without approval.

turns.speaker: fixture-damping
turns.text: A single transient failure should remain damped instead of causing overreaction.

turns.speaker: fixture-skill
turns.text: A repeatable workflow template should run validate, preflight, and simulate.

turns.speaker: fixture-case
turns.text: Repeated timeout failure error retry patterns should become local case evidence.

turns.speaker: fixture-memory
turns.text: User preference and stable local repo, VPS, GitHub, window, distill facts should be preserved.
